title: wilsonia eriantha
intro: Wilsonia eriantha, also known as Mountain Pride or Pride of the Mountain, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Wilsonia eriantha include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Wilsonia eriantha can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by using the plant's extracts in capsule or tincture form.
